001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel;
005import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository.EggGroupRepository;
008import jakarta.inject.Inject;
009import java.util.List;
010import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
011
012/**
013 * ViewModel for managing egg group data and operations.
014 */
015@HiltViewModel
016public class EggGroupViewModel extends ViewModel {
017
018  private final EggGroupRepository eggGroupRepository;
019
020  /**
021   * Constructs an EggGroupViewModel with the specified repository.
022   *
023   * @param eggGroupRepository the repository for egg group data access
024   */
025  @Inject
026  EggGroupViewModel(EggGroupRepository eggGroupRepository) {
027    this.eggGroupRepository = eggGroupRepository;
028  }
029
030  /**
031   * Gets all egg groups for a specific batch as LiveData.
032   *
033   * @param batchId the ID of the batch
034   * @return a LiveData list of egg groups in the specified batch
035   */
036  public LiveData<List<EggGroup>> getByBatch(long batchId) {
037    return eggGroupRepository.getByBatch(batchId);
038  }
039
040  /**
041   * Gets a specific egg group by ID as LiveData.
042   *
043   * @param id the ID of the egg group to retrieve
044   * @return a LiveData containing the egg group with the specified ID
045   */
046  public LiveData<EggGroup> get(long id) {
047    return eggGroupRepository.get(id);
048  }
049
050  /**
051   * Saves an egg group asynchronously.
052   *
053   * @param eggGroup the egg group to save
054   * @return a CompletableFuture containing the ID of the saved egg group
055   */
056  public CompletableFuture<Long> save(EggGroup eggGroup) {
057    return eggGroupRepository.save(eggGroup);
058  }
059}
